Metadata.ogTitle: Nayra Rios | Full Stack Developer & DevOps Engineer
Metadata.ogDescription: Check out my software development and security projects. Specialist in Kotlin, React, and pipeline automation.

summary.title: Professional Profile
summary.content: Software Developer with a hybrid focus between Full Stack development and DevOps engineering. Specialized in building robust applications with Kotlin (Spring Boot) and React/Next.js, with a strong emphasis on security throughout the development lifecycle (DevSecOps). My experience ranges from microservices architecture to cloud deployment automation, always striving for efficiency and scalability.

Chatbot.title: Assistant
Chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm Nayra's assistant. How can I help you?
Chatbot.scheduleInfo: Fill in the form below to book a 60-minute video call with Google Meet.
Chatbot.callComingSoon: This feature is coming soon! In the meantime, you can schedule a video call or email hola@nayri.dev.
Chatbot.askInfo: Type your question below. I can answer about studies, skills, certifications, availability, and more.
Chatbot.formSuccess: Meeting scheduled! You'll receive an email with the Meet link:
Chatbot.formError: Could not schedule the meeting. Please try again.
Chatbot.askNoResult: I couldn't find information about that. Try asking about studies, skills, certifications, or availability.
